case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. VS. DIEGO DURAN LOPEZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-01-2023 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO MAR-08-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY VERONICA ROSALES, ASSIST. MANAGER. DEFENDANT DIEGO DURAN LOPEZ IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF REQUESTS IN COURT TO PROVIDE SPANISH INTERPRETER AT THE NEXT COURT DATE. CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF TO MARCH 08, 2023 AT 1:30 P.M. DEPT 506. PLAINTIFF INFORMS THE COURT THAT BOTH PARTIES ARE WORKING ON SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT OUTSIDE COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MURLENE J. RANDLE; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT DIEGO DURAN LOPEZ IS NOT PRESENT. COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER NINA SAFDIE (#292302) FOR PLAINTIFF IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. VISITING JUDGE: RONALD QUIDACHAY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
